use_cases: Toggle visibility of expanded content sections in lists or articles
Reveal additional items in paginated or loaded content feeds
Expand preview text to show full descriptions
Toggle between condensed and expanded views in dashboards
ai_summary: A minimalist Show More/Show Less toggle component with animated chevron rotation. Features horizontal divider lines that expand to fill available width, using Geist design system styling. The button controls content visibility with a smooth 200ms rotation animation on the arrow icon. Supports noBorder prop for flexible layout integration.
